title: Create Food Goal
description: Creates or updates a user's daily calorie consumption or food plan goals.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: calories
parameters.description: Manual calories consumption goal. Either calories or intensity must be provided.

parameters.name: intensity
parameters.description: Food plan intensity. Either calories or intensity must be provided. Supported : MAINTENANCE | EASIER | MEDIUM | KINDAHARD | HARDER

parameters.name: personalized
parameters.description: Food plan type. Supported : true | false

response_fields.name: goals : calories
response_fields.description: The user's daily caloric consumption goal.

response_fields.name: foodPlan : estimatedDate
response_fields.description: Estimated weight goal achievement date based on current body metrics and food plan intensity values specified. Returned when the intensity query parameter is provided.

response_fields.name: foodPlan : intensity
response_fields.description: Food plan intensity value. Returned when the intensity query parameter is provided. Supported : MAINTENANCE | EASIER | MEDIUM | KINDAHARD | HARDER
